about.title: About
about.intro: MY PERSON is a visual narratives studio crafting cinematic, strategic identities for premium brands. We turn brand presence into cohesive, cinematic experiences that immediately establish market position.

items.title: Brand Identity
items.summary: Complete visual brand identity — from logo and color palette to communication systems and brand guidelines.

items.title: Editorial Content
items.summary: Realistic product and lifestyle photography, no studio shoot, models, or set required. Same day — different marketing directions.

items.title: Visual Strategy
items.summary: A strategic plan for how the brand should look at every customer touchpoint. Instagram, website, marketplace, advertising.

items.title: Video Production
items.summary: Video campaigns for premium brands — from concept and script to production and editing. Ads, presentations, storytelling.

items.title: Analysis
items.summary: An audit of current visual communication. Where the brand loses customer attention, and what it costs.

items.title: Strategy
items.summary: A consistent visual direction — color, typography, mood, narrative. Everything that builds recognizability.

items.title: Production
items.summary: Turning the concept into publish-ready material. Photos, video, content — same day, different stories.

items.title: Verification
items.summary: Every frame goes through quality control — color, light, proportions, detail.

homePhilosophy.title: Why MY PERSON
paragraphs: We don't create content for content's sake.
Every frame has a purpose — sell the product, build the brand, or change how the customer perceives it.
We work with brands that know a good product isn't enough — it has to be shown in a way that makes the customer want to choose it themselves.
The client doesn't pay for technology. They pay for a result that changes how the market perceives their brand.

In our vision, artificial intelligence is not the foundation — it is purely an advanced executional tool. The heart, the director, and the true author of every cinematic story remains the Human. AI listens, but it is we who give it meaning, style, and cinematic depth.

homeContact.title: A brand that's ready deserves a visual language that sets it apart.
homeContact.subheading: Apply for a private visual audit. I review every submission personally. I respond within 48 hours.

footer.description: A visual identity that sells. A visual studio built on strategy for premium brands.
